name: Mocha Acorns
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. Cream together butter and brown sugar until smooth.
4. Add sifted flour, cocoa, instant coffee, vanilla, and salt. Mix well.
5. Roll the dough into 4 long rolls about 1 inch in diameter.
6. Cut each roll into 3/4-inch sections.
7. Roll each section into a ball with your fingertips.
8. Press each ball slightly onto the cookie sheet to form a flat base and pinch the top to create a point (balls should not exceed 3/4 inch in diameter).
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes while still warm.
10. Dip the wide end of each ball into melted chocolate, then roll in pecans.
11. Place the finished acorns in paper candy cups.
